request: You are an independent DinoBrain lifecycle and sync-safety reviewer. Work read-only. Please inspect these local files directly if possible: <machine-local-path> <machine-local-path> <machine-local-path> <machine-local-path> Focus only on whether the plan's completion conditions are adequate for node lifecycle cleanup, task finish-gate integrity, merge/hold/demote/delete/provenance review, scoped auto_sync/git_sync, public-data safety, and GitHub recovery safety. Please return a normal short paragraph or bullets, but include these fields visibly: reviewer_id: R7, verdict: AGREE or REVISE_REQUIRED, blocking_objections, required_doc_changes, evidence_files. Do not modify files.
